nasb.text: When one of those who were reclining at the table with Him heard this, he said to Him, “Blessed is everyone who will eat bread in the kingdom of God!”

esv.text: When one of those who reclined at table with him heard these things, he said to him, “Blessed is everyone who will eat bread in the kingdom of God!”

cnv.text: 一起吃飯的人中有一個，聽了這些話，就對耶穌說：“在　神的國裡吃飯的人有福了。”

ccb.text: 同席的一个客人听了这番话，就对耶稣说：“能够在上帝的国坐席的人多么有福啊！”

csbs.text: 一同坐席的有一个人听了这些话，就说：“将来能在神的国里吃饭的人是蒙福的！”
